title: Making
summary: 本文探讨了AI系统在生成内容时如何通过“制作”（Making）过程来模拟人类创作。作者认为，AI的生成能力不仅仅是复制，而是通过算法组合和调整现有数据来创造新内容。文章强调了AI在艺术、写作和设计中的应用，以及这种“制作”过程对创意产业的潜在影响。
summary_en: This article explores how AI systems simulate human creativity through the 'Making' process when generating content. The author argues that AI's generative ability is not merely replication but creating new content by algorithmically combining and adjusting existing data. The article highlights applications in art, writing, and design, and the potential impact of this 'Making' process on creative industries.
